name: Garden Soil Calculator
seo_description: Calculate how many bags of topsoil, compost or potting mix you need for your garden bed, raised bed or planter. Get instant results with step-by-step.
example_label: Calculate topsoil for 50m2 garden at 20cm depth.
result_context: The result main is {volumen_m3} m³. Este value serves as referencia to your project.
formula_display: Formula specific to tierra-jardin - check documentation technique.
mistakes: Not considering perdidas of carga in tuberias
Size without margin of flow rate simultaneo
Forget pressure minimum requerida in grifos
desc: Calculate the m³ and bags of topsoil or compost for beds and planters.
